The primary funding source supporting her projects is the Meridian Innovators Bureau, which recognizes the importance of innovation in the artisan sector. Furthermore, Rakuunu's professional language is Haitian Creole text, which she utilizes to connect with a broader audience in her publications and community outreach efforts.
